'''pakolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemotechny|mnemotechny]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemotechny|mnemotechny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pakolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækeleth|pækeleth]] || [[word:pækelej|pækelej]] || [[word:pækelesh|pækelesh]] || [[word:pækele|pækele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakokoloth|pakokoloth]] || [[word:pakokoloj|pakokoloj]] || [[word:pakokolosh|pakokolosh]] || [[word:pakokolo|pakokolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakoloth|pakoloth]] || [[word:pakoloj|pakoloj]] || [[word:pakolosh|pakolosh]] || [[word:pakolo|pakolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakofloth|pakofloth]] || [[word:pakofloj|pakofloj]] || [[word:pakoflosh|pakoflosh]] || [[word:pakoflof|pakoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakolotho|pakolotho]] || [[word:pakolojo|pakolojo]] || [[word:pakolosho|pakolosho]] || [[word:pakoloko|pakoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakoloth|pakoloth]] || [[word:pakoloj|pakoloj]] || [[word:pakolosh|pakolosh]] || [[word:pakolo|pakolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakolothol|pakolothol]] || [[word:pakolojol|pakolojol]] || [[word:pakoloshol|pakoloshol]] || [[word:pakolokol|pakolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakolothotho|pakolothotho]] || [[word:pakolojojo|pakolojojo]] || [[word:pakoloshosho|pakoloshosho]] || [[word:pakoloko|pakoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakolothon|pakolothon]] || [[word:pakolojon|pakolojon]] || [[word:pakoloshon|pakoloshon]] || [[word:pakolokon|pakolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakolothoro|pakolothoro]] || [[word:pakolojoro|pakolojoro]] || [[word:pakoloshoro|pakoloshoro]] || [[word:pakolokoro|pakolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
